# Punete Micro SaaS Store

> AIがアイディアを3日でSaaSにする、日本発のMicro SaaSマーケットプレイス。運営: 株式会社プエンテ。

## Service model

- Users post an idea (brief: overview, target users, desired features).
- Claude analyzes the brief and generates a business plan, break-even point, tech stack, and 3-day roadmap.
- Puente's Bolivia offshore engineering team builds and operates the SaaS.
- Launched within 3 days under `apps.puente-ai.net/{category}/{slug}`.
- Revenue split (not royalty): Puente 70% / creator 30%, each party booking own revenue.

## Pricing

- Initial fee: JPY 330,000 (incl. tax). Founder coupon: 80% OFF → JPY 66,000.
- Monthly fee: none.
- Subscription tiers for end users: Free / JPY 980 / JPY 1,980 / JPY 2,980 (incl. tax).

- [Store](https://puente-ai.net/apps)

## Operator

PUENTE Inc. / 株式会社プエンテ
Website: https://www.puentework.com/
